risks.description: Risk of critical intellectual property leakage or theft via digital backbone
risks.name: Intellectual property compromise
risks.activation_condition: If digital backbone architecture opens to external ecosystem

risks.description: Risk of production capacity being insufficient to achieve nominal rate
risks.name: Insufficient production capacity

risks.description: Risk of significant overrun of allocated development budget
risks.name: Development budget overrun

risks.description: Failure or bankruptcy of sole supplier of critical control system components
risks.name: Critical control system component supplier failure

risks.description: Targeted attack on PLM system causing data leakage or unavailability
risks.name: Cyberattack on PLM infrastructure

risks.description: Progressive degradation of manufacturing process quality
risks.name: Manufacturing process quality drift

risks.description: Delay in obtaining required certifications for a strategic supplier
risks.name: Critical supplier certification delay

risks.description: Departure of critical R&D experts to competitors
risks.name: Key R&D team competency loss

risks.description: Undetected critical software defect in control-command system
risks.name: Critical safety embedded software bug

risks.description: Major failure or crash of digital backbone infrastructure
risks.name: Extended digital infrastructure unavailability

risks.description: Risk of not achieving the required profitability level within the specified timeframe
risks.name: Failure to achieve profitability target

risks.description: Risk of delay in starting series production scheduled for 2030
risks.name: Series production start delay

risks.description: Risk of losing technological lead against SMR competitors
risks.name: Loss of competitive technological advantage

risks.description: Risk of non-compliance with nuclear safety standards
risks.name: Regulatory safety non-compliance

risks.description: Risk of geopolitical tension affecting Type A fuel supply
risks.name: Fuel supply tension
risks.activation_condition: If Type A enriched uranium fuel is selected in Q3 2026 decision

risks.name: [TC01] Business Risk 1
risks.description: [TC01 - Baseline] Baseline business risk - L=1, I=1

risks.name: [TC01] Business Risk 2
risks.description: [TC01 - Baseline] Baseline business risk - L=1, I=1

risks.name: [TC01] Operational Risk 1
risks.description: [TC01 - Baseline] Baseline operational risk - L=1, I=1

risks.name: [TC01] Operational Risk 2
risks.description: [TC01 - Baseline] Baseline operational risk - L=1, I=1

risks.name: [TC02] Operational Risk 1
risks.description: [TC02 - Simple Chain] Source risk - HIGH exposure (10×10=100), NO mitigation

risks.name: [TC02] Operational Risk 2
risks.description: [TC02 - Simple Chain] Middle risk - Medium exposure (5×5=25), influenced by Op1

risks.name: [TC02] Business Risk 1
risks.description: [TC02 - Simple Chain] Target risk - Medium exposure (5×5=25), influenced by Op2

risks.name: [TC03] Risk No Mitigation
risks.description: [TC03 - Mitigation Effect] No mitigation - Factor = 1.0

risks.name: [TC03] Risk Low Mitigation
risks.description: [TC03 - Mitigation Effect] 1x Low mitigation - Factor = (1-0.3) = 0.7

risks.name: [TC03] Risk Medium Mitigation
risks.description: [TC03 - Mitigation Effect] 1x Medium mitigation - Factor = (1-0.5) = 0.5

risks.name: [TC03] Risk High Mitigation
risks.description: [TC03 - Mitigation Effect] 1x High mitigation - Factor = (1-0.7) = 0.3

risks.name: [TC03] Risk Critical Mitigation
risks.description: [TC03 - Mitigation Effect] 1x Critical mitigation - Factor = (1-0.9) = 0.1

risks.name: [TC03] Risk Double Medium
risks.description: [TC03 - Mitigation Effect] 2x Medium - Factor = 0.5 × 0.5 = 0.25

risks.name: [TC03] Risk High Plus Medium
risks.description: [TC03 - Mitigation Effect] High + Medium - Factor = 0.3 × 0.5 = 0.15

risks.name: [TC03] Risk Triple Low
risks.description: [TC03 - Mitigation Effect] 3x Low - Factor = 0.7³ = 0.343

risks.name: [TC04] Upstream Unmitigated
risks.description: [TC04 - Influence Limitation] HIGH exposure, NO mitigation - will limit downstream

risks.name: [TC04] Upstream Well Mitigated
risks.description: [TC04 - Influence Limitation] HIGH exposure but CRITICAL mitigation - low residual

risks.name: [TC04] Downstream Target A
risks.description: [TC04 - Influence Limitation] Critical mitigation, but influenced by UNMITIGATED upstream

risks.name: [TC04] Downstream Target B
risks.description: [TC04 - Influence Limitation] Critical mitigation, influenced by WELL-MITIGATED upstream

risks.name: [TC04] Downstream No Influence
risks.description: [TC04 - Influence Limitation] Critical mitigation, NO upstream influence

risks.name: [TC05] Source A - Unmitigated
risks.description: [TC05 - Convergence] Unmitigated source - Residual = 1.0

risks.name: [TC05] Source B - Partially Mitigated
risks.description: [TC05 - Convergence] Medium mitigation - Residual ≈ 0.5

risks.name: [TC05] Source C - Well Mitigated
risks.description: [TC05 - Convergence] Critical mitigation - Residual = 0.1

risks.name: [TC05] Source D - Well Mitigated
risks.description: [TC05 - Convergence] Critical mitigation - Residual = 0.1

risks.name: [TC05] Convergence Point
risks.description: [TC05 - Convergence] Receives influence from all 4 sources with Critical mitigation

risks.name: [TC06] Chain1 Source
risks.description: [TC06 - Full Chain] Source with Critical mitigation

risks.name: [TC06] Chain1 Middle
risks.description: [TC06 - Full Chain] Middle with High mitigation, influenced by well-mitigated source

risks.name: [TC06] Chain1 Target
risks.description: [TC06 - Full Chain] Business target with Medium mitigation

risks.name: [TC06] Chain2 Source
risks.description: [TC06 - Full Chain] Source with NO mitigation

risks.name: [TC06] Chain2 Middle
risks.description: [TC06 - Full Chain] Middle with High mitigation, but influenced by unmitigated source

risks.name: [TC06] Chain2 Target
risks.description: [TC06 - Full Chain] Business target with Medium mitigation

risks.name: [TC06] Final Convergence
risks.description: [TC06 - Full Chain] Receives influence from both chains

risks.name: [TC07] Unmitigated Source
risks.description: [TC07 - Influence Strengths] Same source for all targets - NO mitigation

risks.name: [TC07] Target Weak Influence
risks.description: [TC07 - Influence Strengths] Critical mitigation, WEAK influence from source

risks.name: [TC07] Target Moderate Influence
risks.description: [TC07 - Influence Strengths] Critical mitigation, MODERATE influence from source

risks.name: [TC07] Target Strong Influence
risks.description: [TC07 - Influence Strengths] Critical mitigation, STRONG influence from source

risks.name: [TC07] Target Critical Influence
risks.description: [TC07 - Influence Strengths] Critical mitigation, CRITICAL influence from source

tpos.name: Achieve profitability by 2032
tpos.description: Positive ROI target and operating margin > 15% by end of 2032

tpos.name: NRC safety certification before end of 2029
tpos.description: Obtain all nuclear safety certifications required by the NRC to authorize commissioning

tpos.name: Series production start Q1 2030
tpos.description: Launch series production of the first SMR with an initial rate of 2 units/year

mitigations.name: Critical components dual-sourcing strategy
mitigations.description: Qualification of a second supplier for all critical control system components with signed framework contracts

mitigations.name: R&D talent retention program
mitigations.description: Retention package including long-term incentives, technical career paths and mentoring program for key experts

mitigations.name: Real-time quality review system
mitigations.description: Deployment of IoT sensors and real-time dashboard for continuous monitoring of process quality parameters

mitigations.name: PLM Zero Trust architecture
mitigations.description: Redesign of PLM security architecture following Zero Trust model with micro-segmentation and continuous authentication

mitigations.name: Production contingency plan
mitigations.description: Detailed alternative ramp-up plan with identification of qualified backup subcontractors

mitigations.name: Independent safety code review
mitigations.description: Contract with independent third party for systematic safety-critical code review per DO-178C

mitigations.name: Fuel source diversification
mitigations.description: Negotiation of long-term contracts with fuel suppliers across different geopolitical zones

mitigations.name: Corporate budget management process
mitigations.description: Application of corporate budget tracking process with monthly reviews and automatic alerts on deviations >5%

mitigations.name: Corporate shared SOC
mitigations.description: 24/7 monitoring by corporate Security Operations Center with incident response capability <15min

mitigations.name: Corporate IT continuity plan
mitigations.description: Disaster recovery infrastructure with RTO 4h and RPO 1h for critical systems

mitigations.name: Shared Innovation program
mitigations.description: Access to patents and innovations from other group divisions via intellectual property sharing program

mitigations.name: ISO 19443 Nuclear Quality certification
mitigations.description: Quality system certification per ISO 19443 specific to nuclear supply chain

mitigations.name: IEC 61513 Nuclear I&C compliance
mitigations.description: Systematic application of IEC 61513 standard for nuclear instrumentation and control systems

mitigations.name: NIS2 cybersecurity framework
mitigations.description: Compliance with NIS2 directive for essential service operators in energy sector

mitigations.name: NRC regulatory framework
mitigations.description: Application of NRC framework for nuclear facilities with defined compliance milestones

Safety non-compliance blocks production authorization
Fuel supply tension delays first reactor startup

Critical influence: Op2 → Bus1

Talent retention maintains innovation capability

PLM security protects intellectual property data
Zero Trust architecture drastically reduces attack surface and lateral movement possibilities

Rigorous tracking enables early deviation detection and corrective action
Proactive monitoring allows anticipating certain failures and incidents

Disaster recovery guarantees rapid recovery in case of major failure
Access to group innovations accelerates development
ISO framework structures the supplier qualification process
ISO 19443 framework mandates rigorous quality controls throughout supply chain
IEC 61513 compliance is a prerequisite for I&C systems safety certification
IEC 61513 standard defines strict requirements for nuclear I&C systems development
NIS2 requirements strengthen overall security posture

NRC requirements impose high quality standards on processes
